author: spencer_tb
content:
🧪  `glamsterdam-devnet@v7.1.0`: https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/releases/tag/tests-glamsterdam-devnet@v7.1.0

We are using this EELS branch for reference: [`devnets/glamsterdam/7`](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/tree/devnets/glamsterdam/7)

PTAL at the release notes & the **new** test [release tracker](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/issues/3132) for the full scope.

**New in v7.1.0:**
- EIP-7928/EIP-2780: exclude unloaded recipient from BAL, [EIPs#11902](https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/pull/11902).
